reasoning: This workout targets your lactate clearance limiter, evident from your 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. The 79-minute ride with a moderate heart rate shows potential, but reinforcing your aerobic base is crucial. This session simulates the sustained efforts necessary for the Alpine Loop, especially the climb segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (10 min at 201-218W, 5 min at 242-256W). Recover 2 minutes between efforts at 50% FTP

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
